name: Radicchio & White Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 15-ounce cans small white beans, drained and rinsed twice
1 head radicchio, leaves separated and shredded
1 red bell pepper, stemmed, seeded and minced
10 Kalamata olives, pitted and coarsely chopped
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the shallot in a small bowl and cover with water. Let sit for 10 minutes to reduce acidity, then drain and press between paper towels to remove excess moisture.
2. Combine the shallots with the drained white beans. Stir in the radicchio, bell pepper, parsley, and olives.
3. In a small jar, whisk together the vinegar, garlic, mustard, olive oil, salt, and black pepper until well blended. Pour over the salad and stir to combine. Serve at room temperature.
